creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Just an update, currently running:

%>owncloud --version
ownCloud version 2.0.2
%>uname -a
FreeBSD BIL-BSD 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r292056: Thu Dec 10 11:44:30 GMT 2015     root@BIL-BSD:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BIL_KERNEL  amd64


A behaviour I have noticed is that even when the server is unavailable (because of no network or the server is down) the client still crashes.  I don't have core files for each of these occurrences, but if it would be useful I can find some time and provide the backtraces (as attachments, of course!) for each case?
